title: Attack of the Clones (TCG)
content:

'''''Attack of the Clones''''' is the first expansion card pack made for the [[Star Wars Trading Card Game]] based on [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Star Wars'': Episode II ''Attack of the Clones'']] and [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']].

The expansion was released in [[April 23]] [[2002]]<ref name="forcenet" /> and contains 180 cards including 60 rare, 60 uncommon and 60 common cards. The expansion symbol is that of a [[Clone trooper/Legends|Clone trooper's]] helmet<ref name="wiz" />

TCG: Attack Of The Clones has been sold in boosters containing 11 (7 common, 3 uncommon, 1 rare) or 5 cards, a starter containing two player decks (30 light and 30 dark side), dark side deck (40 dark side) and light side deck (40 light side).<ref name="wiz" />

==Gameplay==
*New abilities
**'''Deflect''' - Prevents X damage, and does X damage to another unit in the same arena
**'''Evade''' - prevent X damage to unit
**'''Critical Hit''' - if player rolls at least one natural 6, the unit does X more damage
**'''Ion Cannon''' - ground units can attack unit in space area instead of unit in ground area
**'''Bombard''' - space units can attack unit in ground area instead of unit in space area
**'''Shields''' - each unit gets -X power when attacking the unit with Shields X

[[File:Tcgaotc_sample.jpg|right|400px]]
*Card Types:
**Battle: 22
**Character: 21
**Ground: 21
**Mission: 21
**Space: 21
**Dark: 65
**Neutral: 46
**Light: 69
